---
title: "Projects"
description-meta: "Research projects, grants and collaborations of Sivalingam S M"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
---

::: {.academic-projects}

::: {.projects-header}

<div class="projects-label"> </div>

# Research Directions

<!-- <p class="projects-summary"> -->
My research spans mathematical foundations, scientific machine learning,
dynamical systems, and learning-based control.
<!-- </p> -->

:::


::: {.projects-section}

<div class="projects-label"> </div>

## Core Research Areas

::: {.research-interest-list}

<div class="research-interest-item">
<div class="research-interest-number">01</div>
<div class="research-interest-content">
<h3>Scientific Machine Learning</h3>
<p>Mathematical foundations and computational methods combining scientific models with machine learning.</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="research-interest-item">
<div class="research-interest-number">02</div>
<div class="research-interest-content">
<h3>Neural Differential Equations</h3>
<p>Continuous-depth neural networks, neural ODEs, and learning-based dynamical systems.</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="research-interest-item">
<div class="research-interest-number">03</div>
<div class="research-interest-content">
<h3>Physics-Informed Learning</h3>
<p>Physics-informed and theory-informed learning methods for differential equations.</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="research-interest-item">
<div class="research-interest-number">04</div>
<div class="research-interest-content">
<h3>Control and Dynamical Systems</h3>
<p>Learning-based control, nonlinear systems, stability, and systems under uncertainty.</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="research-interest-item">
<div class="research-interest-number">05</div>
<div class="research-interest-content">
<h3>Model Predictive Control</h3>
<p>Robust MPC, Tube MPC, and learning-based control policies.</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="research-interest-item">
<div class="research-interest-number">06</div>
<div class="research-interest-content">
<h3>Fractional-Order Systems</h3>
<p>Fractional calculus, fractional differential equations, and fractional dynamics.</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="research-interest-item">
<div class="research-interest-number">07</div>
<div class="research-interest-content">
<h3>Operator Learning</h3>
<p>Neural operators and learning mappings between infinite-dimensional function spaces.</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="research-interest-item">
<div class="research-interest-number">08</div>
<div class="research-interest-content">
<h3>Scientific Computing</h3>
<p>Numerical analysis, stochastic differential equations, optimization, and computational mathematics.</p>
</div>
</div>

:::


<!-- ::: {.projects-section}

<div class="projects-label"> </div>

## Long-Term Research Directions

::: {.research-direction-grid}

<div class="research-direction">
<span>01</span>
<strong>Scientific Machine Learning for Engineering Systems</strong>
</div>

<div class="research-direction">
<span>02</span>
<strong>Neural Operators for Partial Differential Equations</strong>
</div>

<div class="research-direction">
<span>03</span>
<strong>Learning-Based Robust Model Predictive Control</strong>
</div>

<div class="research-direction">
<span>04</span>
<strong>AI for Scientific Computing</strong>
</div>

<div class="research-direction">
<span>05</span>
<strong>Fractional Dynamical Systems</strong>
</div>

<div class="research-direction">
<span>06</span>
<strong>Digital Twins for Structural Health Monitoring</strong>
</div>

<div class="research-direction">
<span>07</span>
<strong>Mathematical Foundations of Neural Differential Equations</strong>
</div>

<div class="research-direction">
<span>08</span>
<strong>Safe and Explainable Scientific Artificial Intelligence</strong>
</div>

:::

::: -->


<!-- ::: {.projects-section}

<div class="projects-label"> </div>

## Research Funding

<p class="projects-section-intro">
I am interested in collaborating on national and international research proposals under programs such as
</p>

::: {.funding-programmes}

<div class="funding-programme">
<span>INDIA</span>
<strong>ANRF</strong>
</div>

<div class="funding-programme">
<span>INDIA</span>
<strong>SERB</strong>
</div>

<div class="funding-programme">
<span>INDIA · FRANCE</span>
<strong>CEFIPRA</strong>
</div>

<div class="funding-programme">
<span>INTERNATIONAL</span>
<strong>BRICS</strong>
</div>

<div class="funding-programme">
<span>BILATERAL</span>
<strong>Indo-French Research Programs</strong>
</div>

<div class="funding-programme">
<span>BILATERAL</span>
<strong>Indo-Taiwan Research Programs</strong>
</div>

<div class="funding-programme">
<span>EUROPE</span>
<strong>Horizon Europe</strong>
</div>

<div class="funding-programme">
<span>BILATERAL</span>
<strong>Indo-UK Collaborative Research</strong>
</div>

<div class="funding-programme">
<span>BILATERAL</span>
<strong>Indo-Japan Collaborative Research</strong>
</div>

:::

::: -->


::: {.projects-section .collaboration-section}

<div class="projects-label"> </div>

## Research Collaboration

<p>
Researchers interested in collaboration in any of the above areas are welcome to contact me.
</p>

<a href="contact.html" class="collaboration-link">
Contact me <span>→</span>
</a>

:::

:::
